name: Wanderlines
notes: Travel LOG (not planner). Web app. Stays 100% free, no paid APIs. The app is /prototype/index.html; `node ../../build.mjs` embeds the shared core (src/core.mjs) and writes the deployable build to /docs, which `serve.mjs` serves. Domain + cloud-sync logic lives ONLY in src/core.mjs — dependency-free, Node-tested (test/core.test.mjs), and embedded verbatim into the app at build time, so the tests cover the exact logic that ships.
